# eval.arena { #raccoon.eval.arena }

`eval.arena`

Checkpoint vs checkpoint evaluation arena.

## Classes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [Arena](#raccoon.eval.arena.Arena) | Play matches between two networks. |

### Arena { #raccoon.eval.arena.Arena }

```python
eval.arena.Arena(player1, player2, num_games=100, num_simulations=50)
```

Play matches between two networks.

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [play_session](#raccoon.eval.arena.Arena.play_session) | Play num_games, alternating who goes first. |

##### play_session { #raccoon.eval.arena.Arena.play_session }

```python
eval.arena.Arena.play_session()
```

Play num_games, alternating who goes first.
